name: Beardie Craft Survival
author: Poki
description: Beardie Craft Survival is a 2D sandbox adventure where creativity and survival go hand in hand! Explore a vibrant world, craft tools, weapons, and structures, and take on tough missions to grow stronger. Battle fierce creatures, uncover hidden secrets, and build anything your imagination allows. Gather resources, stock up on food and weapons, and prepare for what comes after dark. Ready to craft, explore, and survive? How to play Beardie Craft Survival? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD or the joystick to move. Who created Beardie Craft Survival? Beardie Craft Survival is created by Starheart. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Beardie Craft Survival for free? You can play Beardie Craft Survival for free on Poki. Can I play Beardie Craft Survival on mobile devices and desktop? Beardie Craft Survival can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
